scenes.title: The Triumphant Moment
scenes.summary: Plankton finally retrieves the secret formula from the vault

shots.prompt: Wide shot of Plankton's chaotic lab The Chum Bucket, bubbling green vats, metal catwalks, tiny Plankton standing before a glowing vault, triumphant music undertone, cartoon animation style
Close-up of Plankton's tiny hands trembling with excitement as he holds the tiny scroll containing the secret formula, dramatic magnifying glass effect, comedic intensity

scenes.title: The Revelation
scenes.summary: Plankton unrolls the formula and reads what's inside

shots.prompt: Extreme close-up of the tiny scroll unrolling, reveal of actual formula text, Plankton's giant eye widening in shock, cartoon zoom effect
Medium shot Plankton processing what he just read, stunned silence, then slight grin of defeat mixed with respect, heartfelt moment hidden in comedy
